message:
fix: update stale JSONL/SQLite references across doctor subsystem (bd-zw81)

Gate CheckGitConflicts and CheckUntrackedBeadsFiles as legacy-only for
non-Dolt backends. Rename merge driver from "Beads JSONL merge driver"
to "Beads merge driver". Change federation "N/A (SQLite backend)" to
"N/A (non-Dolt backend)". Add Dolt directory detection in redirect
target validation. Fix scanner buffer in countJSONLIssuesAndPrefix to
use 2MB (matching migration_validation.go). Update stale comments
referencing SQLite/JSONL storage across role.go, legacy.go, and
maintenance.go.

Executed-By: beads/polecats/granite
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
